allow: Bash(cd /d/Mansi-portfolio && echo "" | npm create vite@latest . -- --template react --yes 2>&1 || npm create vite@latest . -- --template react --force 2>&1)
Bash(cd /d/Mansi-portfolio && git init && git branch -M main 2>&1)
Bash(cd /d/Mansi-portfolio && git add src public index.html package.json vite.config.js .gitignore && git status 2>&1)

Bash(cd /d/Mansi-portfolio && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Initial commit: Mansi Gautam nursing portfolio

React + Vite portfolio with light/dark theme, ECG animation,
clinical experience, education timeline, skills, and contact sections.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" 2>&1)
Bash(cd /d/Mansi-portfolio && git remote add origin https://github.com/vishesh381/M-Port.git && git push -u origin main 2>&1)

Bash(cd /d/Mansi-portfolio && git add package-lock.json && git commit -m "Add package-lock.json for deterministic installs on Render

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>" && git push 2>&1)
